name: chatgpt-codex-proxy-tools
description: Adds tools that call a local chatgpt-codex-proxy (/v1/messages).

tools.name: codex_chat
tools.description: Send a prompt to chatgpt-codex-proxy (Anthropic /v1/messages) and return the text.

codex_proxy_base_url.title: Codex Proxy Base URL
codex_proxy_base_url.description: Base URL of your running chatgpt-codex-proxy instance.

codex_proxy_model.title: Model
codex_proxy_model.description: Model string passed to /v1/messages. Leave default unless you know what you're doing.
